revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Col-break%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Col-break%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata -->
{{High-use|166631}}
{{tsh|C-b|Mid}}
{{Col-begin template}}

==Template data==
{{TemplateDataHeader}}
<templatedata>
{
	"description": "This template starts each column in a multi-column table.",
	"params": {
		"width": {
			"label": "Column width",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "Width of the column, defined as a percent",
			"example": "50%"
		},
		"class": {
			"type": "string"
		},
		"align": {
			"label": "Column alignment",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "Horizontal alignment for the column contents",
			"example": "align=right"
		},
		"gap": {
			"label": "Column gap",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "Adds a gap to the left of this column",
			"suggestedvalues": [
				"gap=2em"
			]
		},
		"valign": {
			"label": "Vertical alignment",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "Vertical alignment for this column",
			"example": "valign=bottom"
		},
		"style": {
			"label": "Column style",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "Add CSS for this column",
			"example": "style=background-color:aliceblue"
		}
	}
}</templatedata><includeonly>
{{basepage subpage|
<!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}
</includeonly>

<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Multi-column templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
